Action Quantum, Planck Constant (Energy-Frequency-Slope)\footnote{Wirkungsquantum}:
<!-- \index{Plank Constant} \index{Action Quantum} -->

$$\begin{split} &
h = 
\tan(\alpha) = 
\frac{E_{kin}}{\nu_i - \nu_0} = 
\frac{eV_{0i}}{\nu_i - \nu_0} 
\equiv \\&
\frac{E_1 - E_2}{\nu_0} =
\frac{W}{\nu_0} = 
\frac{F_{EM} \cdot x}{\nu_0} = 
\hbar k \lambda
\end{split}$${#eq-quant_h-1}

$$\begin{split} &
\hbar = 
\frac{E_1 - E_2}{\omega} = 
\end{split}$${#eq-quant_h-2}

$$\begin{split} &
E_{kin}^{max} = 
eV_0 = 
e \frac{Q}{C} = 
h(\nu - \nu_0)
\end{split}$${#eq-quant_h-4}

$$
V_0 = \textnormal{Opposing Potential ($I=0$)}
$$\linebreak$$
\alpha = \angle( E_{kin}, \nu ) \qquad
e = \textnormal{electron charge} \qquad
Q = \textnormal{ion charge} \qquad
$$\linebreak$$
C = \textnormal{Capacitance} \qquad
\nu = \frac{1}{2\pi} \frac{1}{\sqrt{LC}} \sqrt{1 - \frac{C}{L}R^2}
$$\linebreak$$
\Rightarrow \textnormal{Inductance } L = \frac{4\pi^2}{C} \left( \frac{e}{h}Q + \nu_0 \right)^2
$$
